ops.text: athome meta campaign: a completed experiment with zero kept units cannot generate a retrospective — "experiment 001-watcher-rank64-capacity-qwen3-8b completed with zero kept units: a retrospective requires at least one kept metric" (RetroError, exit 1 on the drain that completed it; hit 2026-07-19, meta-p6 root). An honest negative (candidate scored 0.9317 vs baseline 0.9326 → discard) is exactly the result a retro should record; requiring a kept metric means every all-discard experiment loses its writeup and the campaign's "retro'd" leg silently depends on the science going positive. The drain also exits 1 AFTER the completed ledger row, so the round's follow-on proposal never happens. Owner fix: let retros render from the journal (baseline + per-unit metrics/verdicts) regardless of kept count.
